text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 56 

OUD_DX_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Diagnosis and Procedure Basis for OUD — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Diagnosis and Procedure Basis for Opioid Use 
Disorder (OUD) as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: OUD_DX_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME: OUD_DX _MEDICARE 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1
